title: scutellaria axilliflora
intro: Scutellaria axilliflora, also known as the axillary skullcap, is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant belongs to the mint family and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Scutellaria axilliflora include its potential to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and stress, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Scutellaria axilliflora include teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to support mental health and well-being.
